visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up top-down view of two wooden bento boxes filled with colorful food: white rice, dark curry sauce with meat, bright green broccoli, yellow baby corn, and red cherry tomatoes. A smiley face is crafted on one rice portion using seaweed. (2) A woman with dark hair tied back in a kitchen setting holds up a colorful curry ingredient packet and a plastic tray of pre-cooked rice to the camera. She is wearing a white tank top. (3) The woman uses pink chopsticks to carefully place broccoli florets, baby corn, and bell pepper slices into a pot of boiling water on an induction stove. Steam rises from the pot. (4) She places the sealed curry packet into the boiling water to heat it up. Close-up shots show the water bubbling around the packet and vegetables. (5) The woman puts the rice tray into a microwave and starts it, then smiles at the camera through the microwave door. (6) A sequence of assembly shots follows: she shapes the rice with a mold, cuts sheets of dried seaweed with orange-handled scissors, and carefully arranges the cooked vegetables and curry sauce into the wooden bento boxes using chopsticks. (7) She meticulously places small pieces of seaweed onto the rice to create eyes and a smiling mouth. Small red cherry tomatoes are added to resemble hair or a hat. (8) A young boy with short hair sits at a wooden table, pulling a bento box toward him and looking at it with curious eyes. (9) Another young boy wearing glasses opens a bento box lid, looks inside, and lets out a huge, joyful smile, showing his excitement.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 woman (mother) preparing food, 2 young boys eating.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with her hair tied back, wearing a white ribbed tank top with a small cartoon monkey logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, clean kitchen with white cabinets, a white tile backsplash, and wooden accents. A living room area with a light-colored couch and a wooden dining table is also visible.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Cheerful and bouncy acoustic background music begins, featuring a bright guitar melody and light glockenspiel accents. The atmosphere is warm and family-oriented. (2) Ambient kitchen sounds include the soft sizzle and bubble of water in a pot. Quick 'pop' sound effects play synchronously with the appearance of colorful text on screen. (3) A mechanical click is heard when the microwave door is closed, followed by the faint hum of the machine. The music remains dominant and upbeat. (4) Small percussive sounds occur as the woman taps ingredients into place. (5) In the final phase, a woman's voice warmly asks '好吃嗎?' (Is it delicious?), followed by the joyful, high-pitched vocal reaction of a child and further playful music swells.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Introduction -> Preparation -> Assembly -> Emotional Reward
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video provides a warm, step-by-step demonstration of a mother preparing a visually appealing and nutritious 'character bento' for her children. It emphasizes the love and effort (emotional value) invested in family meals, ending with the children's happy reactions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed shots of the specific curry packaging and clear visibility of the Simba brand on the kitchen scissors used for the seaweed.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses vibrant colors, playful text, and a cheerful soundtrack to target a parenting audience interested in creative meal prep.
